config_note: Knowledge tasks dispatch by explicit stage_key columns. Uvicorn web processes run with TASK_WORKER_AUTOSTART=0, and scripts/backend_watchdog.sh starts standalone task_worker_main processes. worker_process_slots caps the standalone worker process count unless TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES overrides it; each process hot-reloads this JSON every 5s. worker_total_memory_limit_mb=49152 makes the watchdog restart the worker group when total worker RSS crosses 48GB, relying on DB-backed queue recovery. claim_lock_scope=process serializes claim only inside one worker process; PostgreSQL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED prevents duplicate claims while avoiding a global advisory-lock bottleneck. stage_concurrency caps individual DAG nodes; lane_concurrency caps resource groups such as local_preprocess, model_analysis, and relation_build so local CPU work cannot consume all model-analysis entrances. Changing TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES, worker_total_memory_limit_mb, or DB pool env values requires backend restart.
